pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh where TARGET_USER is explicitly set to 'forensic_target' and used in the logger command.
Verified by reading the task description in task.json which explicitly instructs the agent to use this exact string.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh where a loop runs exactly 5 times to inject the targeted syslog messages.

privileged_info_summary: The task injects exactly 5 synthetic failed SSH login logs for the user 'forensic_target'. The agent is required to annotate one of these events with the exact text 'CASE-999: Verified scan'.
